query_title: Beyond the Valley of the Dolls

recommendations.title: Beneath the Valley of the Ultra-Vixens
recommendations.overview: Believe it or not, even Smalltown USA, those unfulfilled and unrelieved in the midst of plenty reside. Levonna and Lamar could have the perfect relationship, were it not for Lamar's obsession with rear entry.

recommendations.title: Supervixens
recommendations.overview: Clint must flee after his wife is killed by a psychopathic cop, who tries to pin the murder on him.

recommendations.title: Faster, Pussycat! Kill! Kill!
recommendations.overview: A trio of thrill-seeking go-go dancers kidnap a young girl and attempt to seduce an old rancher and his two sons out of their small fortune, but their scheme doesn't play out as intended.

recommendations.title: Up!
recommendations.overview: Adolf Hitler is hiding out in California under the identity of Adolf Schwartz; however, he is soon murdered by a mysterious assailant. This coincides with the arrival of a mysterious woman in a nearby town. Whatever the case might be, nobody seems in

recommendations.title: Vixen!
recommendations.overview: In a Canadian mountain resort, Vixen Palmer resides with her naive pilot husband Tom. While he's away flying in tourists, she sleeps with practically everybody including a husband and his wife, and even her biker brother. However, the only one she wo

recommendations.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
recommendations.overview: Singer Freddie Mercury, guitarist Brian May, drummer Roger Taylor and bass guitarist John Deacon take the music world by storm when they form the rock 'n' roll band Queen in 1970. Hit songs become instant classics. When Mercury's increasingly wild li

recommendations.title: We're So Young
recommendations.overview: The life of Renato Russo, from his first involvement with music, to his years in the punk rock band Aborto Alétrico, to the formation of Legião Urbana, in the Brasília rock scene of 1970s and 1980s.

recommendations.title: Sing Street
recommendations.overview: A boy growing up in Dublin during the 1980s escapes his strained family life by starting a band to impress the mysterious girl he likes.

recommendations.title: I Used to Be Famous
recommendations.overview: A former boy band star unexpectedly gets a second shot at success when he forms a bond with a gifted young drummer.

recommendations.title: Almost Famous
recommendations.overview: In 1973, 15-year-old William Miller's unabashed love of music and aspiration to become a rock journalist lands him an assignment from Rolling Stone magazine to interview and tour with the up-and-coming band, Stillwater.
